title: ctxloom Context Fragment
description: Schema for ctxloom context fragment YAML files

version.description: Schema version for the fragment format

author.description: Who created or maintains this fragment

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and profile assembly

notes.description: Human-readable documentation (NOT sent to AI). Use for usage guidance, caveats, when to use/avoid.

installation.description: Setup/installation instructions (NOT sent to AI). Document required dependencies, configuration steps, or prerequisites.

content.description: The context content sent to the AI. Markdown format. Supports {{variable}} substitution.

content_hash.description: SHA256 hash of content for change detection. Format: sha256:<hex>

distilled.description: Compressed/distilled version of content that preserves meaning with fewer tokens. Generated by 'ctxloom distill'.

distilled_by.description: The LLM model that performed the distillation (e.g., 'claude-3-opus', 'gpt-4').

no_distill.description: If true, this fragment should not be distilled. Use for content that must remain exactly as written.

exports.description: Exported variable values from generators. Maps variable names to their values.

claude-code.description: Claude Code slash command export settings. Prompts are exported by default (opt-out model).

enabled.description: Set to false to disable slash command export. Default is true (exported).

description.description: Description shown in /help for this command.

argument_hint.description: Hint for expected arguments, shown in autocomplete.

allowed_tools.description: Tool restrictions for this command. If not specified, all tools are allowed.
